[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 001001011 4
4 100100001 3
5 001101101 5
6 011111000 5
7 001010000 2

01 10 000000001 1
12 21 000100001 2
23 32 001101000 3
34 43 001010000 2 match 7
45 54 001010000 2 match 7
56 65 001000101 3
67 76 001001011 4 match 3
70 07 001001011 4 match 3

02 20 001001001 3
13 31 000100000 1
24 42 001000000 1
35 53 011010000 3
46 64 001000000 1
57 75 001010001 3
60 06 001001011 4 match 3
71 17 000100001 2

03 30 001001000 2
14 41 000000000 a match 0 1 2
25 52 001000101 3
36 63 001001000 2
47 74 001010000 2 match 7
50 05 001000001 2
61 16 100000001 2
72 27 001101001 4

04 40 001000000 1
15 51 000000001 1
26 62 001001101 4
37 73 001111000 4
